page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, indicating a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio with no hyperthreading. The processor is an Intel Xeon 8369B running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz.

This instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per physical core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. The network interface provides a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and substantial memory capacity, the ecs.r7.32xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise applications requiring large in-memory datasets without the overhead of hyperthreading. Appropriate workloads include large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and heavy data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B cores running at 2.7 GHz, with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The instance is configured with 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB of memory per core, and lacks local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. Designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, this instance is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data processing workloads that benefit from dedicated physical cores and a high memory-to-CPU ratio.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale databases and in-memory workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise database and caching workloads.
